name: Lady Zou
page_title: Lady Zou 鄒氏 [Zhang Xiu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Former wife of Zhang Ji. Caught Cao Cao’s fancy while staying with Zhang Xiu.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	鄒氏


	 Simplified Chinese 
	邹氏


	 Pronunciation 
	Lady Zou 


	 Wade-Giles 
	Lady Tsou

	 Other Names 
	Lady Zhou

	 Name Notes 
	Appears as ‘Lady Zhou’ in Koei games, and in the Brewitt-Taylor translation. Lady Zou’s name is strange in meaning. Zou1 is a surname as expected, but Shi4 is a clan or maiden name.

full_text:
Lady Zou 鄒氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Zou (鄒氏). Former wife of Zhang Ji. Caught Cao Cao’s fancy while staying with Zhang Xiu. Lady Zou was affiliated with Zhang Xiu.
